---
title: "DataPoll: A Tool Facilitating Big Data Research in Social Sciences"
author: "Charalampous, A., Djouvas, C., and Christodoulou, C."
date: 2025-01-01
description: "IEEE Transactions on Computational Social Systems, 12(2), 511–524. doi: 10.1109/TCSS.2024.3506582"
categories: [Media and Social Media Monitoring]
image: images_publications/journal-article.png
---
